tests.minimum_expectation: at least one meaningful MCP test or explicit skip reason

target_files.legacy-to-mcp11/input-documents/petclini: New MCP REST client interface for pet READ operations using @RegisterRestClient(configKey="petclinic")
Typed DTO for Pet resource including nested PetType and Visit references
Typed DTO for PetType nested resource
Typed DTO for Visit nested resource
MCP server class exposing petclinic pet operations as @Tool methods via ToolResponse + TextContent
Add port 8888, CORS, and rest-client URL properties
Add MCP sidecar container on port 8888 to existing petclinic Deployment
Unit/integration test for PetclinicMcpServer tools with mocked REST client

tech_debt.LocalDate JSON serialization: Jackson may require JavaTimeModule registration; verify quarkus-jackson auto-configures LocalDate deserialization or add explicit ObjectMapper customization
tech_debt.No pagination on listPets/listPetTypes: Endpoints return unbounded lists; large datasets may cause memory pressure in the MCP sidecar
tech_debt.Read-only field enforcement: DTOs mark fields as readOnly in schema but Java POJOs have no enforcement

modernization_steps.task: Create typed DTOs: Pet, PetType, Visit under org.acme.client.dto
Create PetclinicRestClient interface with @RegisterRestClient(configKey="petclinic"), @Produces(APPLICATION_JSON), and five GET methods matching operationIds

Create PetclinicMcpServer @ApplicationScoped class with @Inject @RestClient PetclinicRestClient and @Inject ObjectMapper; expose listPets, getPet, getOwnersPet, listPetTypes, getPetType as @Tool methods returning ToolResponse with TextContent; no throws declarations
Add MCP sidecar container definition to the existing petclinic Deployment spec; containerPort 8888; do not modify existing containers, Service, or Route
Write PetclinicMcpServerTest with at least one test verifying a @Tool method returns a non-null ToolResponse when the REST client returns a mocked Pet

evaluation_criteria: @Inject and @RestClient both present on the PetclinicRestClient field in PetclinicMcpServer
configKey 'petclinic' in @RegisterRestClient matches quarkus.rest-client.petclinic.url in application.properties
No throws declarations on any @Tool-annotated method in PetclinicMcpServer
No new ObjectMapper() instantiation anywhere in the MCP server or REST client code
At least one meaningful MCP test exists in PetclinicMcpServerTest or an explicit skip reason is documented
Sidecar container in petclinic-kubernetes.yaml exposes containerPort 8888
Legacy Deployment, Service, and Route resources in petclinic-kubernetes.yaml are not modified
All five GET endpoints (listPets, getPet, getOwnersPet, listPetTypes, getPetType) are declared in PetclinicRestClient
All five endpoints are wrapped as @Tool methods in PetclinicMcpServer
Typed DTOs (Pet, PetType, Visit) are used as return types — no raw Map or JsonNode
